description: This clutch from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion.Dimensions : 11 cm x 28 cmSilk brocade upper with a flapDouble buttoned magnetic closureTwo compartments with fabric liningOne pouch pocketCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
